title: Read fallback/default slot by reusing already-mstored seed — no extra memory write needed
trigger_patterns: per-token override with global default fallback
token specific config falling back to default
royalty info per token or default
description: When per-token data is zero (not set), fall back to a global default. If the global default slot is a constant already written to memory for the per-token lookup, sload(mload(offset)) reads it without an extra mstore. The seed is already in memory from the keccak256 call — reuse it directly.
when_to_apply: Two-tier storage patterns where the fallback slot address is a constant already in memory
when_not_to_apply: When fallback slot requires its own computation, or when per-token data is almost always set
